name: skill-injector
description: WIP, UNTESTED: two LLM-backed hooks (Ollama default, Gemini CLI fallback) — a UserPromptSubmit hook that injects a relevant-skill suggestion, and a PreToolUse subagent-prompt quality gate that injects advisory feedback before agent dispatch. Not yet tested end-to-end; review before installing/enabling.

skills.name: skill-injector
skills.description: Docs for the skill-injection hook: injects a relevant-skill suggestion on prompt submit.

scripts.name: skill_classifier
scripts.description: Skill-injection hook (Ollama default, Gemini CLI fallback). NOTE: file/module still named skill_classifier — rename pending during the test pass.

scripts.name: llm_backend
scripts.description: Swappable LLM backend shared by the hooks

scripts.name: prompt_quality_gate
scripts.description: PreToolUse hook: advisory quality review of subagent prompts

backends.ollama: Default. Local Ollama server (https://ollama.com); pull a small model and set SKILL_CLASSIFIER_MODEL. No Python packages required (stdlib urllib).
backends.gemini: Fallback. Requires the `gemini` CLI on PATH and GEMINI_API_KEY.
